# coverage-ignore.txt
#
# Regex fragments (one per line) for files EXCLUDED from the coverage gate.
# These are pure-UI / bootstrap / generated files that we deliberately do not
# measure. Everything NOT matched here counts toward the "testable core" gate.
#
# Consumed by:
#   - scripts/coverage-gate.sh (xccov line filter, as an extended-regex alternation)
#   - llvm-cov export -ignore-filename-regex (branch coverage)
#
# Keep this list MINIMAL and reviewed — every line is coverage we choose not to
# measure. Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
#
# Anything outside the app source (test files, SDKs, DerivedData) is also
# excluded by the leading patterns below.

# --- non-source / tooling ---
/Tests/
/DerivedData/
/Build/
\.build/
/Applications/Xcode
/usr/
SourcePackages/

# --- pure-UI module trees ---
/Sources/Clipboard/Views/
/Sources/PrefsWindow/
/Sources/WelcomeWindow/
/Sources/Popover/

# --- UI / bootstrap / app-lifecycle files ---
/Sources/AppDelegate\.swift
/Sources/RawmStatusItem\.swift
/Sources/TitleBarManager\.swift
/Sources/GreenButtonManager\.swift
/Sources/CrashReporter\.swift
/Sources/LaunchOnLogin\.swift
/Sources/ClipboardBootstrap\.swift

# --- any SwiftUI/AppKit view file, wherever it lives ---
View\.swift
